original text:
The Periscope login page analysis has found it safe to use. A app to download for iPhone and Android stores that lets you explore the world through the eyes of somebody else.
We scanned Periscope.tv and the report is generated below with a full technical scan of the login hosted on the 52.27.2.202 website IP address.
Reverse DNS matches what the Periscope login is recorded as from the registrar. There are 1080 other domains linking to it and 1 internal links from the page.

original text:
When converted into binary, how many bits are present in an IPv4 Address?
IPv4 addressing consists of four octets of eight bits each. 8x4=32 bits per address. Example: 192.168.1.1 in binary is 11000000.10101000.00000001.00000001, which is 32 bits.
